creator: tr@hc.ru
text:
Server for mass hosting with 1000 sites on it freezes every 8 hours at
the average. No kritical error occurs, no messages. If the server remains
unloaded, it's works fine. We've excluded all possible problems with
hardware as the problem persists on different servers from different
vendors. We've examined FreeBSD 6.5 (32 bit), FreeBSD 7.2 (64 bit) and
FreeBSD 8.0 (64 bit) and only 64-bit versions are believed to make the
server freezed.

Hosting Center is the second largest hosting provider in Russia. We run
over a hundred servers for mass hosting under FreeBSD and until now
there was no other problem like this one. We would be very grateful for
any help from FreeBSD developers team. 

Additional details as follows :

Core options :

options         QUOTA

options         IPFIREWALL
options         IPFIREWALL_VERBOSE
options         IPFIREWALL_VERBOSE_LIMIT=100
options         IPFIREWALL_FORWARD
options         IPFIREWALL_DEFAULT_TO_ACCEPT


options         IPSTEALTH
device          pf
device          pflog
device          pfsync
#options         ALTQ

options         DEVICE_POLLING
options         HZ=1000

options         GEOM_JOURNAL
options         FULL_PREEMPTION
options         IPI_PREEMPTION


Hardware :

hostb0@pci0:0:0:0:      class=0x060000 card=0xa48015d9 chip=0x65c08086 rev=0x90 hdr=0x00
pcib1@pci0:0:2:0:       class=0x060400 card=0x00000000 chip=0x65f78086 rev=0x90 hdr=0x01

Firewall : pf

Fix: 

If pf is completelly turned off, everything is OK.
